findings_surfaced_during_pass: 16 new Quest endpoints (nodes/edges/dependencies sub-resources + QuestRun read surface) shipped on backend but have NO SDK counterparts yet — surfaced by API_SYNC verification. Candidate next track or addition to a future self-audit pass.

Tinyman decimals fix is partial — caller-supplied accepted with 6 fallback, indexer ASA lookup is still a TODO in source. tracks.md self-audit-one-fix description overclaims this; consider a follow-up.
SwapController never had a GET /api/swap/{id} route — the prior PROVIDERS.md/API_SYNC.md entries for it were fictional. Now removed.
open_decisions: E1 image pin (surrealdb v1.5.4 lacks surrealkv) — open since 2026-05-24, still blocks integration runtime evidence
IVaaSignatureVerifier 'fail-closed until done' caveat on api-safety-hardening row — Secp256k1VaaSignatureVerifier is registered; gate likely cleared but needs one-line confirmation
integration-test-namespace-isolation: per-test SurrealDB namespace not propagated to WebAPI executor; blocks the 3 STARODK IDOR integration tests; not yet a formal track
